title: verbascum coromandelicum
intro: Verbascum coromandelicum, also known as the Coromandel mullein or Himalayan mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum coromandelicum include relieving chest congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, and its leaves can also be used as a poultice to treat skin irritations.
